text_blocks.text: Nova Tutinia, elementary school. By day I'm Favilla, school assistant. I handle 50 little hurricanes every day.

text_blocks.speaker: bimbo_1
text_blocks.text: Favilla! Have you seen my eraser?!?

text_blocks.speaker: bimbo_2
text_blocks.text: It's mine! I found it first!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Kids... careful, the eraser is magic — if you fight, it'll erase your toys!
If only you knew what's waiting for me at home...
Then there's home. The real battlefield is called Sparkle Ale.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: MOOOM! MILK! TOYS! CHAOSMAX!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Bubbà! Little Ale, one disaster at a time!
He's Mallow Bellow, the software-developer dad. He writes code, but often crashes the house.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Milk overflow...

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Daddy bug! Mommy fix!
Explosive breakfasts, endless laundry, toys everywhere. This is my daily training.
Siri: "Household disorder: 92%. Estimated time to tidy: 47 hours."

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Ale, the spoon goes in your mouth, not into orbit!

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Rocket spoon!

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: I just invented the sock-frisbee!

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Daddy chaos champion!
But every day comes the moment when the chaos crosses the line.
Toys everywhere, smoking pots, laundry invading the couch.
Mallow Bellow's laptop blinks: "COMPILATION FAILED".
Siri: "ALERT! Disorder 99%! Evacuate immediately!"

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: TOTAL CHAOS! WINNERS!

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: The system is completely down...
Favilla closes her eyes. Two chaoses. A spark inside her.
It's time.
In a flash, the glasses vanish, the sweater disappears, her blonde hair turns into a mane of fire.
Her work uniform gives way to a super-gym suit with pink and gold flames. The aura around her bursts with energy.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Supermom superpowers: ACTIVATED!
From the shadow of the school... FAVILLA BLAZE is born.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Did I... marry a superhero?

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mommy FLAME!
